zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Betham於1398年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德貝坦時，她的父親Sir Thomas Betham29歲，母親Eliza Woolsly44歲。她於大約1413年與Sir Richard Musgrave II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年在英國維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Betham于1398年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德貝坦时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Betham29岁，母亲Eliza Woolsly44岁。她于大约1413年与Sir Richard Musgrave II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1464年在英国維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Betham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Beetham
meanings: English: habitational name from Beetham in Westmorland, probably named from a plural form, bjóthum, of the Old Norse element bjóth ‘embankment, table’, i.e. ‘(place near) the embankments’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Betham was born in 1398, in Beetham, Westmorland, England, her father, Sir Thomas Betham, was 29 and her mother, Eliza Woolsly, was 44. She married Sir Richard Musgrave II about 1413. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1464, in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Betham est née en 1398, à Beetham, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Betham, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eliza Woolsly, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Musgrave II environ 1413. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1464, à Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Betham 1398 in Beetham, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Betham 29 und ihre Mutter Eliza Woolsly 44. Sie hat um 1413 Sir Richard Musgrave II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1464 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Betham è nata il nel 1398 nel Beetham, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Betham, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Eliza Woolsly, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Musgrave II circa 1413. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1464, nel Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Bethamが1398年にイギリスウエストモーランドビーサムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Bethamは29歳，母Eliza Woolslyは44歳であった。約1413年にSir Richard Musgrave IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1464年にイギリスウエストモーランドキルクビー ステフンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Betham(이)가 1398년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 브이섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Betham(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eliza Woolsly(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1413년 Sir Richard Musgrave II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 커k비 스티븐에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Hartly Castle, Kirkby Stephen, Westmorel: Hartley, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Betham nasceu em 1398, em Beetham, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Betham, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eliza Woolsly, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Musgrave II aproximadamente 1413. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1464, em Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Betham родилась в 1398 г. в местности битам, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Betham было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eliza Woolsly, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Musgrave II около 1413 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1464 г. в местности киркби стифен, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Betham nació en 1398, en Beetham, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Betham, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eliza Woolsly, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Musgrave II aproximadamente 1413. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1464, en Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
